DefaultStrikes.Name: Default enemy Strike count
DefaultStrikes.Hint: How many Strikes each enemy is assumed to make per round when estimating immediate knock-out threat on the Encounter Danger Board.

DebugLogging.Name: Debug logging
DebugLogging.Hint: Write Grim Arithmetic diagnostic messages to the browser console (F12). Leave off unless troubleshooting.

EnableMonteCarlo.Name: Enable Monte Carlo encounter simulation
EnableMonteCarlo.Hint: Turn on the Encounter Forecast's full-fight simulation. Disable on low-end machines if runs are too slow — the Encounter Danger Board still works either way.

Common.DownTooltip: Chance this PC is knocked out in one round by this attack.
Common.RiskPillTooltip: Risk rating from chance of being downed: Low → Grim.
Common.CiTooltip: 95% confidence interval — the range the true value likely falls in given sampling variance.

DangerBoard.Heading: Grim Arithmetic v{version}
DangerBoard.Tagline: Encounter danger board — immediate mortality pressure, not fate.
DangerBoard.ForecastTooltip: Run a Monte Carlo simulation of the whole encounter to forecast downs, deaths, and TPK risk.
DangerBoard.DetailSelectionTooltip: Open a detailed one-attacker-vs-one-PC mortality breakdown for the selected token and target.
DangerBoard.RefreshTooltip: Recompute the danger board from the current combat state.
DangerBoard.TooLarge: Encounter too large to compute a danger board safely. Reduce combatants, or use the selection + target button above for a single-pair view.
DangerBoard.Empty: No encounter-wide risk to show. Start a combat with PCs and hostile NPCs, or use the selection + target button above.
DangerBoard.EndangeredTooltip: PCs ranked by their single-round chance of being knocked out by the most dangerous incoming attack.
DangerBoard.DangerousTooltip: Enemy attacks ranked by their single-round chance of knocking out a PC.

Forecast.Heading: Encounter Forecast
Forecast.Tagline: Monte Carlo simulation of the active encounter under explicit assumptions.
Forecast.TacticsTooltip: How simulated enemies pick targets and actions each round — changes who gets attacked and how focused the damage is.
Forecast.CiNote: Bracketed values are 95% confidence intervals from sampling variance.
Forecast.AnyPcDownTooltip: Chance at least one PC is knocked out (0 HP) at some point in the encounter.
Forecast.TpkTooltip: Total Party Kill — chance the entire party is downed during the encounter.
Forecast.FirstDownTooltip: Average combat round in which the first PC is knocked out, across all simulated runs.
Forecast.HealsTooltip: Average number of healing actions the party spends per simulated encounter.
Forecast.RecoveryTooltip: Average number of PF2e recovery checks (rolled while dying) per simulated encounter.
Forecast.HeroPointTooltip: Share of runs where spending a Hero Point to avoid death changed a PC's outcome.

Table.DownTooltip: Chance this PC is knocked out at least once during the encounter.
Table.DeathTooltip: Chance this PC dies during the encounter.
Table.ExpectedHpTooltip: This PC's average ending HP across all runs.
Table.BiggestThreatTooltip: The enemy that dealt this PC the most damage on average.
Table.RiskTooltip: Overall danger rating for this PC, derived from down/death chance.
Table.DamageShareTooltip: Percentage of the party's total damage taken that this enemy dealt.
Table.TopTargetTooltip: The PC this enemy attacked most often.

PairDetail.Heading: Pair Detail
PairDetail.EnemyStrikeTooltip: Which of the enemy's attacks to model.
PairDetail.EnemyTurnTooltip: How many Strikes the enemy makes this turn (drives the multiple-attack penalty).
PairDetail.MapTooltip: Multiple Attack Penalty — how the −5/−10 penalty on later Strikes is applied.
PairDetail.ShieldTooltip: Temporary AC change to model, e.g. Raise a Shield.
PairDetail.WoundedTooltip: Override the PC's PF2e Wounded value used in dying math.
PairDetail.HeroPointTooltip: Whether a Hero Point is assumed available to avoid death.
PairDetail.EnemyStrikeTermTooltip: The enemy attack being modeled — its to-hit bonus and damage formula.
PairDetail.ModeledHpTooltip: The PC's HP used here, including temporary HP.
PairDetail.EffectiveAcTooltip: The PC's AC after the shield/AC adjustment above.
PairDetail.WoundedTermTooltip: The PF2e Wounded value applied — it raises the dying counter when knocked out.
PairDetail.DamageRangeTooltip: Min–max damage on a normal hit and on a critical hit.
PairDetail.DamageSwingTooltip: How variable the damage is — higher means less predictable.
PairDetail.DamageAdjustmentTooltip: Modifiers applied to raw damage (resistances, weaknesses, etc.).
PairDetail.DownChanceTooltip: Chance this attack sequence knocks the PC out this turn.
PairDetail.ExpectedHpAfterTurnTooltip: The PC's average remaining HP after the modeled enemy turn.
PairDetail.DyingIfDownedTooltip: The PF2e Dying value the PC starts at if knocked out — normal hit vs crit.
PairDetail.DeathThresholdTooltip: The Dying value at which the PC dies, accounting for Doomed.
PairDetail.ImmediateDeathFlagTooltip: Whether the attack can kill the PC outright (massive/instant death).
PairDetail.HeroPointNoteTooltip: How a Hero Point would affect this outcome.
